does_not_prove: No storyboard panel image was generated.
No WebGPT visual review was run.
No Kling or paid provider call was made.
No full persona-dream panel repair transaction is proven without a concrete one-panel work order and receipts.
proves: Tau committed persona-dream command specs for panel-creator, panel-reviewer, and persona-dream-panel-repair-gate are loadable and executable through handoff-command-loop.
The loop no longer fails with missing_agent_command_spec for the three persona-dream panel agents when using the committed spec root.
The command loop preserves mocked=false/live=true boundaries and reaches an explicit human blocker instead of claiming panel/media/provider success without receipts.

terminal_result_summary: Persona Dream Panel Repair Gate reached the explicit first blocker: no one-panel work-order, panel creator receipt, visual review receipt, or loop final receipt was attached. provider_eligibility remains false.

verification_commands.command: PYTHONPATH=src uv run pytest tests/test_cli.py -q -k 'handoff_command_loop or handoff_dispatch_agent_command'

PYTHONPATH=src uv run tau handoff-command-loop --start <proof>/start-handoff.json --receipt-dir <proof>/command-loop --agents-root /home/graham/workspace/experiments/agent-skills/agents --command-spec-root experiments/goal-locked-subagents/agent-command-specs --active-goal-hash sha256:2424... --max-steps 4
